tagline: TRIGGER ON UPDATE is now generally available.
what_it_does: TRIGGER ON UPDATE is now generally available. Use trigger on update in Databricks SQL when creating a pipeline schedule to refresh the pipeline when a source table changes. You can manually refresh a standalone materialized view or streaming table when you know that the source tables have been updated.
why_it_matters: You can also create notifications and set the performance mode for your scheduled refreshes.
key_takeaway: TRIGGER ON UPDATE is now generally available.
